title: myriandra michauxii
intro: Myriandra michauxii, also known as Red Raisin or Carolina Red Raisin, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. Myriandra michauxii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal use.
